channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street signs left on pavement, 4th March
item.description:
Please organise collection.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gulley drain, 4th March
item.description:
Gulley drain blocked with mud and tree bits. At bottom of slope, so excess rain water misses drain and floods road below.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanmore Terrace, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kingsway west side bus stop P, 4th March
item.description:
Patching repair has failed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsway, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard B3203 Lost its reflective coating, 4th March
item.description:
Please can this be fixed ? Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves have not been cleared and bllack bag left, 4th March
item.description:
Please clear the leaves and litter from around round about
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dyot st by bucknal st, 4th March
item.description:
Camden has installed a raised junction without adequate thought to drainage. Another failed experiment to get water to flow uphill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dyott Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sweep needed please - thankyou x, 4th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelstan Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip AGAIN ! clothes recycling bins full again, 4th March
item.description:
Please could the fly tip be removed and clothes recycling emptied ? Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Athelstan Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste left in black bags, 4th March
item.description:
We have a repeated incidence of black bags with building waste (insulation /plastics) being left outside our property on the public pavement. It was left in the evening or overnight on 3rd March 2026. Please remove, it is not ours and we have not and will not touch or move it. This seems to be a regular occurrence on College Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported this huge hole this morning and council lied that it is repaired., 4th March
item.description:
Road is in terrible state. Huge lump missing. Long and wide. No repair work has been done in this. Yet the council have updated and removed the report from thia morning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 4th March
item.description:
The bush is restructing the footway and collecting debris underneath it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Bushey Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slabs loose, 4th March
item.description:
One of the slabs is extremely loose and uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Little Birches, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken drainage cover on maiden lane, 4th March
item.description:
Res has called up to state that there is a badly sunken drainage cover on maiden lane junction with auction place. This has been like this for some time and its creating a lot of noise for residents each time a car goes over. This does have a light green cross on it so technicians might be working on this but resident stating it could cause a bad accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Barnes Cray Cottages, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste in carrier bag, 4th March
item.description:
Waste in white carrier bag left next to Biffa sacks outside 45 Great Guildford Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Great Guildford Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no tax and MOT, 4th March
item.description:
Undrivable condition left on public highway with no tax or MOT since 2016. It has been here for two weeks taking up resident parking
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned black moped, 4th March
item.description:
The moped has been there for the past 2 months or so, it is clearly not operational and just takes up space there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large and deep pothole, 4th March
item.description:
A large and deep pothole right in the middle of the road presenting a health and safety risk to road users and vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large and deep pothole. Engineer been advised to come fix it at the end of Jan, still no fixing., 4th March
item.description:
A large pothole rather deep and wide in the middle of the road representing problems for both carriageway and all vehicles. Apparently contractors were tasked to go fix it at the end of Jan, but still there and getting worse and worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned red moped, 4th March
item.description:
I believe it has been in this state for at least a year, it has not been operated, and it doesn't look like it's working. The owner chained it to the fence, s.t. it cannot be pulled away. It is located closer to the end of the driveway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping part of sofa, 4th March
item.description:
Part of a grey sofa (looks like sofa seat) has been flytipped on pavement outside of our house (148 Ravenscroft Road) - has been there for a week. Please could you remove? Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
